zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Conyers於1468年出生在英國越可爾素斯 考福頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton43歲，母親Alice Wycliffe32歲。她與Sir Ralph Bowes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1532年8月12日在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國越可爾素斯 考福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Conyers于1468年出生在英国越可爾素斯 考福頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton43岁，母亲Alice Wycliffe32岁。她与Sir Ralph Bowes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1532年8月12日在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国越可爾素斯 考福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Conyers was born in 1468, in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton, was 43 and her mother, Alice Wycliffe, was 32. She married Sir Ralph Bowes. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 12 August 1532, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Conyers est née en 1468, à South Cowton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice Wycliffe, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Bowes. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1532, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à South Cowton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Conyers 1468 in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton 43 und ihre Mutter Alice Wycliffe 32. Sie hat Sir Ralph Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. August 1532 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England und wurde in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Conyers è nata il nel 1468 nel South Cowton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Alice Wycliffe, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Bowes. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 12 agosto 1532, nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a South Cowton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Conyersが1468年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス コウトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowtonは43歳，母Alice Wycliffeは32歳であった。Sir Ralph Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1532年8月12日にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで64歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス コウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Conyers(이)가 1468년 영국 요르크실르 소우스 코우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Wycliffe(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir Ralph Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 8월 12일 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 소우스 코우턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Conyers nasceu em 1468, em South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice Wycliffe, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Bowes. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1532, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Conyers родилась в 1468 г. в местности соут коутон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Wycliffe, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Bowes. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 12 августа 1532 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности соут коутон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Conyers nació en 1468, en South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Alice Wycliffe, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Bowes. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1532, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
